PROP-01b-partial1-pre-008.text: performUpkeep must reject assets with usdValue below minAuctionSizeUsd to prevent dust auctions.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-008.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): usdValue(asset) >= minAuctionSizeUsd; else revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize

locations.note: availableAssetUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize at lines 346-347
